name: FizzBuzz
description: Given a positive integer n, return a list of strings representing the FizzBuzz sequence from 1 to n. For each number: if divisible by 3 and 5, use 'FizzBuzz'; if divisible by 3, use 'Fizz'; if divisible by 5, use 'Buzz'; otherwise use the string representation of the number.
tests:
def test_fifteen():
    result = fizzbuzz(15)
    assert result[0] == '1'
    assert result[2] == 'Fizz'
    assert result[4] == 'Buzz'
    assert result[14] == 'FizzBuzz'
